== Notes for [[Item:Q88271|Q88271]] ==

ID: I62216

Name: Seleucus of Syria

Given Name: Seleucus

Surname: of Syria

Sex: M

_UID: DA4BF86467822B4BB460271813097C4E19B3

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Antiochus of Syria

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I62216

Birth: in c. 404 BC

Birth: in c. 404 BC

Birth: in c. 404 BC

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
